meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding to overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for clients to trust your invisible work. Build a high-fidelity user onboarding flow that demonstrates your technical prowess. By deploying a polished, interactive onboarding experience using Antigravity and Claude Code, you turn a 'no-portfolio' problem into a 'product expert' credential that closes high-ticket contracts immediately.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, but clients only see an empty void where social proof should be. It is a vicious cycle: you need clients to get projects, and you need projects to get clients. 

But what if you didn't need a massive history of work to prove your value? By building a sophisticated, friction-free user onboarding flow, you demonstrate that you understand the one thing every client craves: user retention. This isn't just code; it's a strategic asset that proves you can move the needle on their business metrics from day one.

steps.title: Define the Frictionless User Flow
steps.description: Map out a 3-step onboarding journey that highlights a specific user benefit. This establishes your competence in UX strategy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modern React component structure for a 3-step onboarding wizard. Focus on state management for progress tracking and smooth framer-motion transitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding-wizard component with tailwind styling'

steps.title: Build the Interactive State Engine
steps.description: Implement robust state management to ensure users don't get frustrated. Reliability is the hallmark of a senior dev.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a hook-based state machine for the onboarding flow that handles validation and prevents moving to the next step without valid input.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'useOnboarding hook for state management'

steps.title: Integrate Micro-Interactions
steps.description: Add polish with subtle animations. This separates amateur code from production-ready software.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add subtle entrance and exit animations to the onboarding steps using Framer Motion to ensure a premium feel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'add framer-motion animations to existing steps'

steps.title: Implement Data Persistence
steps.description: Show you understand the backend by saving user progress to local storage or a mock API.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a persistence layer that saves user progress in localStorage so users can return to their onboarding state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'localstorage persistence for onboarding progress'

steps.title: Final QA and Responsive Refinement
steps.description: Ensure the flow works perfectly on mobile, as most users will experience it on their phones.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current onboarding implementation for mobile responsiveness and accessibility (WCAG compliant).
steps.claude_code_command: claude review 'check mobile layout and accessibility'

pro_tips: Use 'skeleton screens' during data processing steps to make the app feel faster than it actually is.
Always include a 'skip' option; forcing users through onboarding is a major conversion killer.
Log onboarding abandonment points to identify exactly where users lose interest in your UI.
Use standard design patterns (like the 'Empty State' pattern) to show you understand industry conventions.
Document your code with JSDoc; it looks professional when a potential client asks to see your repo.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the flow, and add it to your LinkedIn profile as your 'Featured' project.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to build a portfolio piece that converts. Stop worrying about what you haven't done and start shipping what you can do right now. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
